hero.title: OWN THE AIR
hero.line1: Stop waiting for the right station to appear.

login.title: JOIN THE STATION
login.description: Sign in with an available provider to access your radios, dashboard, and stream tools.
login.noProvidersTitle: No OAuth providers are currently enabled.
login.noProvidersDescription: Enable GitHub or Discord in the backend configuration and this page will update automatically.

dashboardPicker.title: Choose a radio
dashboardPicker.description: Pick a station to open the console, monitor automation and manage the library.
dashboardPicker.empty: You don't have any radios yet. Create your first station to get started.

createRadio.title: Create radio
createRadio.description: Define the station name and base configuration. You can adjust the rest later in the radio console.

description.label: Description
description.placeholder: A short editorial note to identify the station.

isPublic.label: Public radio
isPublic.description: Allows exposing the station publicly once the stream is ready.

errors.createFailed: Couldn't create the radio. Please try again.

dashboardSettings.title: Workspace settings
dashboardSettings.description: This area will hold account configuration, dashboard preferences and station options.

radioSettings.title: Station {radioId}
radioSettings.description: This area will hold the configuration specific to this radio.
